name: Tomato Soup with Chicken Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine the ground chicken, 1 tablespoon of finely chopped onion, and 1 tablespoon of chopped parsley.
2. Shape into 6 equal meatballs; set aside.
3. In a 1-quart microwavable casserole, combine the remaining finely chopped onion, celery, and oil. Stir to coat the ingredients evenly.
4. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 2 minutes, stirring once halfway through cooking until the onion is translucent.
5. Add tomato juice, ready-to-serve chicken broth, and paprika. Stir to combine.
6. Continue microwaving on HIGH for 2 more minutes.
7. Add the meatballs; cover and microwave on HIGH for another 2 minutes.
8. Add macaroni, remaining chopped parsley, and pepper. Stir to combine.
9. Microwave on HIGH for an additional 30 seconds until the meatballs are no longer pink.
Per serving: 1/2 Fat, 2 Proteins, 2 Vegetables, 1/2 Bread, 20 Calories
Optional Calories: 278 Calories, 11g Fat
